src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/DaveBacke.general_idea: Enable ShedLock distributed scheduler locking to prevent concurrent execution of scheduled tasks.
Import the ShedLock annotation class required for the new scheduler lock configuration.
Reformat existing Spring annotations to use multi-line syntax for better readability.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Adjust indentation and remove empty lines in method signature and Javadoc to match code style standards.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.human_impl:
final HttpServletResponse response,
                final FilterChain filterChain

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Add Slf4j annotation to enable logging in the configuration class.
Rename cache key constants from ZAEHLSTELLE to ERHEBUNGSSTELLE to reflect domain terminology changes.
Remove configuration for authentication cache map as it is no longer managed here.
Replace hardcoded cache idle times with configurable properties for search results and count data.
Update Spring profiles for local configuration to include docker and unittest profiles.
Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variable definitions.
Add logging statements to output Hazelcast configuration values at startup.
Explicitly set backup count to 0 for cache maps to disable replication backups.
Move java.util.Locale import to the top of the import block to follow standard Java import ordering conventions.
Remove unnecessary blank lines between imports and the class declaration to clean up the file structure.
Replace deprecated `authorizeRequests()` with `authorizeHttpRequests()` using lambda configuration to comply with Spring Security 6+ API changes required for JDK 21 compatibility.
Replace deprecated `headers().frameOptions().disable()` chain with lambda-based `headers()` configuration to align with modern Spring Security API.
Replace deprecated `csrf().disable()` chain with lambda-based `csrf()` configuration using method reference.
Add imports for `AbstractHttpConfigurer`, `HeadersConfigurer`, and `AntPathRequestMatcher` required by the new Spring Security configuration syntax.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21.
Replace deprecated Spring Security 5.x DSL methods with Spring Security 6.x lambda-based DSL to ensure compilation on JDK 21.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.human_impl: Replaced .authorizeRequests().antMatchers() with .authorizeHttpRequests(request -> request.requestMatchers()) and .oauth2ResourceServer().jwt() with .oauth2ResourceServer(oauth2 -> oauth2.jwt(jwt -> ...)).

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Remove unused OAuth2 client configuration bean that relies on deprecated or removed classes in newer Spring Security versions.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.human_impl: Deleted the authorizedClientServiceAndManager bean and its associated imports (AuthorizedClientServiceOAuth2AuthorizedClientManager, etc.).

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Replace Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor with explicit constructor to manually initialize dependencies, likely due to Lombok compatibility or explicit initialization needs.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.human_impl: Removed @RequiredArgsConstructor and added explicit constructor taking userInfoUri and RestTemplateBuilder to initialize customJwtAuthenticationConverter.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Configure security headers and CSRF to allow access to the H2 console, which is often required for development environments in newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove an unnecessary empty line between imports and the class declaration to clean up code formatting.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.human_impl: Deleted the blank line before the @Configuration annotation.
